results.rendered_html: vi-tasti f. (once in  Hcat.  m.; prob. fr. √tan) a partic. measure of length (defined either as a long span between the extended thumb and little finger, or as the distance between the wrist and the tip of the fingers, and said to = 12 Aṅgulas or about 9 inches),  ŚBr. ;  GṛŚrS.  &c.
